theses.label: Technical AI and fintech founders, DACH
theses.description: Deep-technical founders in Germany, Austria and Switzerland building AI for finance and productivity.

theses.label: AI developer-tools founders
theses.description: Founders building the tooling and infrastructure layer for AI-native software.

theses.label: Open-source maintainers turning founders
theses.description: High-authority open-source maintainers with the pull to build a company.

ventures.name: gedonus
ventures.tagline: AI drafts your slides. You stay in control.
ventures.problem: Finance teams (IB, PE, consulting) spend hours building pitchbooks and IC packs by hand, where one wrong number or off-brand slide is expensive.

decision.rationale: Team reads at 44 on medium confidence, the founders cover ground each other does not.

redundancies: Overlap on Domain, more than one founder covers it
Overlap on Product, more than one founder covers it
sharedHistory: Registered partners of gedonus GbR since 2025, named together in the Impressum
Both based in Frankfurt, inside the finance-team market they sell into
A third partner, Tim Niklas Sassmannshausen, is not yet evaluated

ventures.name: Agent tooling
ventures.tagline: Command-line and editor tooling for coding agents.
ventures.problem: Developers running AI coding agents lack fast, native tooling to steer and observe them.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Evan You-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Vercel
ventures.tagline: Frontend cloud and the Next.js framework.
ventures.problem: Shipping fast, reliable web apps is hard to operate.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; David Cramer-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: VoidZero
ventures.problem: JS tooling is fragmented and slow.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Zeno Rocha-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Open-source infrastructure
ventures.tagline: Thousands of npm packages the ecosystem depends on.
ventures.problem: The JS ecosystem needs reliable small building blocks.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Sid Sijbrandij-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Nuxt / Vite ecosystem
ventures.tagline: Core tooling and DX for modern frontends.
ventures.problem: Frontend DX needs constant maintenance and invention.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Tobias Lütke-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: shadcn/ui
ventures.tagline: Copy-paste components and the registry model.
ventures.problem: Component libraries are hard to own and customise.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Sindre Sorhus-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Takeoff
ventures.tagline: Learn to build with AI, in public.
ventures.problem: Developers need to learn AI building fast.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Zeno Rocha-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Agentic
ventures.tagline: An AI agent standard library and toolset.
ventures.problem: Wiring tools into LLM agents is repetitive and brittle.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Theo Browne-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Developer experience
ventures.tagline: Teaching and tooling for shipping on the web.
ventures.problem: Web devs need clear paths to production.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Mckay Wrigley-tier on our anchor set.

ventures.name: Next venture
ventures.problem: Monorepo and build tooling at scale.

decision.rationale: Strong across the metrics we can verify; Zeno Rocha-tier on our anchor set.

founders.name: Stefan Cames
founders.headline: gedonus co-founder, Deutsche Bank engineering and tech strategy, Frankfurt School Digital Business

proof.rationale: Real but modest public code: 6 repos over a 7-year account, from a Bundeswettbewerb Informatik submission to a recent MCP server and an agentic-SDLC experiment, all finished rather than abandoned. The weight of his evidence is professional and non-public: Java and web development at Deutsche Bank plus its Tech Strategy team, which does not show up as stars.
